# yGuarder GUI

**yGuarder GUI** is a professional, standalone graphical interface for the [yGuard](https://github.com/yWorks/yGuard) Java bytecode obfuscator. It is designed for developers and DevSecOps engineers who need to protect Java intellectual property as part of their software delivery pipeline.

---

## Quick Start

### 1. Download

Download the latest portable bundle from the [Releases](../../releases) page.

### 2. Install the Runtime (First Time Only)

The portable bundle does not include a Java runtime by default. Run the installer script once:

```powershell
.\install_runtime.ps1
```

This downloads and extracts **Azul Zulu JRE FX 21** into the `runtime\` folder.

### 3. Launch

```
run.bat
```
